case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. MICHAEL GAONA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; NOTICE PURSUANT OT CCP 1033 (B) (2) (TRANSACTION ID # 100043841) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAONA, MICHAEL $2,859.83 PRINCIPAL, $309.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,169.33, SEE SCANNED DOC
